game_name: Tom & Jerry: The Ultimate Game of Cat and Mouse!

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Throwing weapons
special_mechanics.description: Player can throw various weapons as primary attack mechanic. Documented items include hammer (stage 1), mothballs (stage 5), and unused jam jar.

special_mechanics.name: Swinging weapons
special_mechanics.description: Player can swing melee weapons. Documented melee weapon animations exist for multiple item types.

special_mechanics.name: Health/Hit system
special_mechanics.description: Player takes damage from hits. Each hit deducts one full heart (fractional damage system was unused in final version). Regional differences: Japanese version restores health after every sub-level; Western versions do not.

physics_values.health_restoration: Japanese version only, after each sub-level

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise physics parameters documented. Source material (TCRF) focuses on unused content, regional differences, and developer notes rather than movement mechanics. Game mechanics are inferred from item/weapon systems and level structure only.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tom & Jerry (NES) article
